calendar.matters:
Petition Of Successor Trustee Karen Lee Kothe For Order Confirming Trust Assets And Transferring Assets Into Trust
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for (Trustee) Karen Kothe.

The Court stated that there is no issue with account 8944 being confirmed as a trust asset but that the other accounts were not enumerated as trust assets. Mr. Freedman stated that the assets have always been in Randall's name, were note in the name of Elizabeth, as being held jointly or as the trust, that upon the death of Elizabeth the bypass trust was funded, that Randall did not take care of the titling of certain assets and that the only issue is is it to be funded to the trust or to probate it and distribute to the trust. Mr. Freedman cited the Kucker case indicating that the intent was clear that he wanted the personal assets in the trust. The Petition of Successor Trustee Karen Lee Kothe for Order Confirming Trust Assets and Transferring Assets into Trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Suspemsion Of Powers And Removal Of Appointed Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Karen Kothe.

The Court stated that the matter appears to be in order, that noticed was dispensed with to Mr. Wilson and that Mr. Ateljevich was not present to object. Mr. Freedman stated that it is an exercise of power of appointment, that the Will of the Decedent will be lodged but not probated, and that the Trust and will provide that as long as the Trustee determined that the trust was valid he could exercise his power of appointment. The Court granted the Petition for Suspension of Powers and Removal of Appointed Trustee and Appointment of Successor Trustee (subject to review of the order). The trust waives bond.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
